accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text, including the two-year report deadline and one-year strategy deadline.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose as reauthorizing the CHD program and adding reporting/strategic planning requirements.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes the three amendments to Section 399V-2 of the Public Health Service Act, including redesignation, new subsection (f), and authorization extension.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions beyond the standard consultation requirement.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the 2-year deadline for report, 1-year deadline for strategy after report, and FY2025-2029 reauthorization.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions: report requirements, strategy requirements, consultation, and authorization extension.

concise.why: Very detailed and long; includes subsection redesignation details that are minor technical housekeeping not essential to a summary.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies Section 399V-2 of the Public Health Service Act, the two committees, CDC, NIH, and HRSA.

correct_figures.why: Correctly states the 2-year and 1-year deadlines and FY2025-2029 authorization period; approval date November 21, 2024 matches.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
